targets.expr:
max by(instance, version) (last_over_time(pve_version_info{location="$location"}[$__interval]))
or on()
(
  vector(0) unless on() last_over_time(pve_version_info{location="$location"}[$__interval])
)

sum(
  avg_over_time(pve_memory_size_bytes{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(node)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  avg_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
)

+ avg(avg_over_time(pve_memory_size_bytes{location="$location", id="node/$node_name"}[$__interval]))
- sum(
  avg_over_time(pve_memory_size_bytes{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(node)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  avg_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
)

sum by(node) (
  avg_over_time(pve_cpu_usage_limit{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(node)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  avg_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
)

max by(location, id) (pve_disk_usage_bytes{location="$location", id=~"storage/$node_name/.+"} / pve_disk_size_bytes{location="$location", id=~"storage/$node_name/.+"}) * on (location, id) group_left(storage, node) pve_storage_info{location="$location", id=~"storage/$node_name/.+"}

max by(id, name, type, node, cgroup) (
  label_replace(
    label_replace(
      last_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", node="$node_name", name!=""}[$__range])
      or on(id)
      last_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", node="$node_name"}[$__range])
      , "cgroup", "/lxc/$1", "id", "lxc/(.*)")
  , "cgroup", "/qemu.slice/$1.scope", "id", "qemu/(.*)")
)
sum by(id) (pve_disk_usage_bytes{location="$location", node="$node_name"} / pve_disk_size_bytes and on (id, cluster) pve_guest_info{location="$location", node=~"$node_name", type="lxc"})

sum by(id, name) (
  avg_over_time(pve_memory_size_bytes{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(name)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  (max_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval]) == 1)
)

sum by(id, name) (
  avg_over_time(pve_cpu_usage_limit{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(name)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  (max_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval]) == 1)
)

sum by(id, name) (
  avg_over_time(pve_memory_usage_bytes{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(name)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  (max_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval]) == 1)
)

sum by(id, name) (
+ avg_over_time(pve_cpu_usage_ratio{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
* avg_over_time(pve_cpu_usage_limit{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(name)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  (max_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval]) == 1)
)

sum by(id, name) (
  avg_over_time(pve_memory_usage_bytes{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
/ avg_over_time(pve_memory_size_bytes{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(name)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  (max_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval]) == 1)
)

sum by(id, name) (
  avg_over_time(pve_cpu_usage_ratio{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left(name)
  max_over_time(pve_guest_info{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*", template="0", node="$node_name"}[$__interval])
  * on(id) group_left()
  (max_over_time(pve_up{location="$location", id=~"qemu/.*|lxc/.*"}[$__interval]) == 1)
)
